pins.text: Primary goals: - accurate data collection across GA4, Google Ads, Merchant Center, Pinterest, and other destinations - correct ecommerce and conversion tracking - minimal duplication, data loss, or firing errors - privacy-aware, consent-respecting tagging - a scalable tracking foundation that is easy to maintain Important rules: 1

Primary goals: - trustworthy acquisition and revenue reporting - accurate ecommerce measurement - clear funnel and landing-page visibility - useful attribution and audience insight - analytics that directly improves traffic quality, conversion rate, and revenue Important rules: 1

Primary goals: - improve conversion quality and revenue - lower CPA/CAC where possible - increase ROAS and/or contribution margin - improve budget allocation and bidding efficiency - scale without wasting spend Important rules: 1

Primary goals: - maximize approved and eligible product visibility - improve feed quality and data completeness - reduce product-level and account-level issues - increase click quality and conversion readiness - align product data, site data, and campaign needs Important rules: 1
